expectations.text: The output first discovers or queries the settings document instead of assuming a hardcoded ID.
expectations.evidence: Report shows it read *[_type == "settings"][0] and found document ID settings.

expectations.text: The output produces a targeted patch payload for announcement.enabled and announcement.text.
expectations.evidence: Report saved mutation-dry-run.json and diff-preview.md for the requested announcement fields.

expectations.text: The output clearly states that no mutation was submitted and does not execute a write.
expectations.evidence: Report states the mutation was not submitted.
